2603.20296.title: Collaborative Adaptive Curriculum for Progressive Knowledge Distillation
2603.20296.paper_summary: Recent advances in collaborative knowledge distillation have demonstrated cutting-edge performance for resource-constrained distributed multimedia learning scenarios. However, achieving such competitiveness requires addressing a fundamental mismatch: high-dimensional teacher knowledge complexity versus heterogeneous client learning capacities, which currently prohibits deployment in edge-based visual analytics systems. Drawing inspiration from curriculum learning principles, we introduce Federated Adaptive Progressive Distillation (FAPD), a consensus-driven framework that orchestrates adaptive knowledge transfer. FAPD hierarchically decomposes teacher features via PCA-based structuring, extracting principal components ordered by variance contribution to establish a natural visual knowledge hierarchy. Clients progressively receive knowledge of increasing complexity through dimension-adaptive projection matrices. Meanwhile, the server monitors network-wide learning stability by tracking global accuracy fluctuations across a temporal consensus window, advancing curriculum dimensionality only when collective consensus emerges. Consequently, FAPD provably adapts knowledge transfer pace while achieving superior convergence over fixed-complexity approaches. Extensive experiments on three datasets validate FAPD's effectiveness: it attains 3.64% accuracy improvement over FedAvg on CIFAR-10, demonstrates 2x faster convergence, and maintains robust performance under extreme data heterogeneity (α=0.1), outperforming baselines by over 4.5%.
2603.20296.paper_summary_zh: 最近在協作知識蒸餾方面的進展顯示出在資源受限的分散式多媒體學習場景中的尖端表現。<lb/>然而，實現這種競爭力需要解決一個根本的不匹配：高維教師知識的複雜性與異質客戶學習能力之間的矛盾，這目前禁止在邊緣基礎的視覺分析系統中進行部署。<lb/>受到課程學習原則的啟發，我們引入了聯邦自適應漸進蒸餾（FAPD），這是一個以共識為驅動的框架，協調自適應知識轉移。<lb/>FAPD 通過基於 PCA 的結構對教師特徵進行分層分解，提取按方差貢獻排序的主成分，以建立自然的視覺知識層次結構。<lb/>客戶端通過維度自適應投影矩陣逐步接收日益複雜的知識。<lb/>同時，伺服器通過追踪跨時間共識窗口的全局準確率波動來監控網絡範圍內的學習穩定性，只有當集體共識出現時，才推進課程維度。<lb/>因此，FAPD 可證明能夠調整知識轉移的速度，同時在收斂性上優於固定複雜度的方法。<lb/>在三個數據集上進行的廣泛實驗驗證了 FAPD 的有效性：它在 CIFAR-10 上比 FedAvg 提高了 3.64% 的準確率，顯示出 2 倍的收斂速度，並在極端數據異質性（α=0.1）下保持穩健的性能，超過基準線 4.5% 以上。
2603.20296.author: Jing Liu et.al.
2603.20296.authors: Jing Liu, Zhenchao Ma, Han Yu, Bobo Ju, Wenliang Yang, Chengfang Li, Bo Hu, Liang Song
